title: Nizam Per-Feature Contract Schema
description: Validates .agent/contracts/NNN.json, the pre-code alignment artifact scoping a single feature's deliverables, non-goals, and verification commands before implementation begins.

contract_id.description: Unique contract identifier, matching the feature it scopes, e.g. '001'.

feature_id.description: Id of the feature in feature_list.json this contract scopes.

name.description: Short human-readable name of the contracted feature.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the contract.

spec_ref.description: Path to the product spec document this contract derives from.

scope.description: The files this contract authorizes the generator to create or modify.

non_goals.description: Explicit statements of what this contract does NOT authorize.

amendments.description: Records of post-approval amendments to this contract, if any. Each entry is either a legacy free-text string in the form 'YYYY-MM-DD: <summary>' (per contracts 001.json and 016.json), or the richer structured object form {at, by, target, type, change, rationale, dry_run_proof, ratified_by_mode_b} (per contract 019.json). Not required at the top level -- contracts with zero amendments (the common case) still validate without this key.

verification.description: The commands the generator and validator/evaluator run to prove the contract's acceptance tests are met.

estimated_lines.description: Estimated lines of change for this feature.

evidence_dir.description: Directory where this contract's verification evidence files are written.

evidence_convention.description: The naming convention used for this contract's evidence files.

approvals.description: Optional record of who/what approved this contract and when.

revisions.description: Count of contract-negotiation revision rounds this contract went through before approval.
